allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "wmic process where name=''ZulexPharma.API.exe'' get ProcessId,Name 2>&1")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Id 10640 -Force; Start-Sleep 1; Get-Process -Name ''ZulexPharma.API'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=internet2010 "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -h localhost -U postgres -d zulexpharma_db -c "DELETE FROM \\"__EFMigrationsHistory\\" WHERE \\"MigrationId\\" IN \('20260410152735_AllPendingChanges','20260410160409_AddCfopAndCodigoIbge','20260410164653_AddAdquirenteContaReceberVoucher','20260410184811_AddNfce','20260410205653_AddIbptTax'\);")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=internet2010 psql -h localhost -U postgres -d zulexpharma_db -c 'SELECT p."FilialId", p."Nome", \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM "EntregaFaixas" f WHERE f."PerfilId" = p."Id"\) AS faixas, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM "EntregaAgendas" a WHERE a."PerfilId" = p."Id"\) AS agenda_slots FROM "EntregaPerfis" p;')
